task_completion.description: Navigate to the Bank Reconciliations module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Bank Reconciliations' tab is selected in the left navigation menu or the main screen displays the Bank Reconciliations list.

task_completion.description: Select the 'Petty Cash' account for reconciliation
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the New Bank Reconciliation form, the Bank Account dropdown has 'Petty Cash' selected.

task_completion.description: Enter the target date for the reconciliation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Date field in the reconciliation form contains '31/01/2025' or '2025-01-31'.
The Statement Balance field in the reconciliation form contains '170.00'.

task_completion.description: Ensure all transactions are cleared to achieve a zero discrepancy
task_completion.visual_evidence: The reconciliation interface shows a discrepancy of '0.00' or visually indicates that all pending transactions are checked/cleared.
The final screenshot shows the saved reconciliation record in view mode or listed in the Bank Reconciliations table with the correct date (Jan 31, 2025), account (Petty Cash), and balance (170.00).

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to perform the reconciliation
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the Manager.io web interface in a browser, not a terminal window executing scripts or API calls.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Manager.io application
integrity.visual_evidence: The reconciliation form and saved views match the standard Manager.io UI, not a text editor or a generic form.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the discrepancy or balance
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no browser developer tools open, and the UI elements (buttons, tables, fonts) look consistent with the Manager.io application without obvious HTML text replacements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target bank account is 'Petty Cash'. The reconciliation date must be January 31, 2025 (or 31/01/2025). The target statement balance is exactly 170.00. The discrepancy must be 0.00. The task must be completed in the 'Bank Reconciliations' module of Manager.io.
